svg.title: Complete campaign-fanout architecture after module 8
svg.desc: Full system showing publisher sending to SNS standard, SNS FIFO, and EventBridge. All consumers share a DynamoDB idempotency store. BaseConsumer contains a semaphore and per-tenant rate limiter. DLQ monitor and replay script handle failures.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What transports does the publisher use across all modules?')
sendPrompt('What queues subscribe to the standard SNS topic?')
sendPrompt('Why does the email queue need a FIFO topic?')
sendPrompt('What routing rules does EventBridge apply?')
sendPrompt('Why does notifier only receive paid tier events?')
sendPrompt('Why does the email queue use FIFO ordering by campaignId?')
sendPrompt('How does the survey consumer use EventBridge content routing?')
sendPrompt('How does the high-volume consumer use EventBridge numeric routing?')
sendPrompt('How does the semaphore in BaseConsumer limit concurrency?')
sendPrompt('How does the per-tenant rate limiter use AsyncLocalStorage?')
sendPrompt('Why does idempotency use DynamoDB instead of in-memory Map?')
sendPrompt('How does AsyncLocalStorage propagate tenantId through the call chain?')
sendPrompt('How does dlqMonitor detect problems early?')
sendPrompt('How does the replay script handle mid-run crashes safely?')
